name: Pumpkin Delight
recipeInstructions:
1. Place whole graham crackers in a 13 X 9-inch pan.
2. Melt margarine and brush over the crackers.
3. Put cream cheese in a bowl and beat with an electric mixer.
4. Mix spices in pumpkin and add to cream cheese.
5. Add sugar, milk, and sprinkle in dry pudding mix. Mix until well combined.
6. Fold in the pumpkin and cream cheese mixture.
7. Beat until well blended.
8. Pour into the pan and spread over the crackers.
9. Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate overnight.
